title: Evidence Index Entry
description: A single entry in the evidence index, tracking an artefact or record that serves as evidence for gate compliance.

title.description: Human-readable title of the evidence item

phase.description: Lifecycle phase for which this evidence was produced

gate.description: Gate that this evidence satisfies (none if not gate-specific)

status.description: Evidence threshold status: exists (produced), reviewed (quality checked), approved (formally accepted)

path.description: Relative path to the evidence file or URL to the evidence location

created_by.description: Person or role who produced this evidence

reviewed_by.description: Person or role who reviewed this evidence

approved_by.description: Person or role who formally approved this evidence

description.description: Brief description of what this evidence demonstrates
